text.title: Engineering Ladder And Growth Plan — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the org have ≥5 engineers, a named owner for the ladder, and ≥1 engineer who flagged unclear growth?

branch.when: engineer_count >= 5 AND named_owner_present == true AND growth_complaints >= 1
branch.conclusion: Author the full ladder L1-L5 + per-engineer growth-plan + promo-packet template. Use reference ladders as anchors, not as copy.
Block. Resolve owner first; anonymous ladders rot.
Skip. Use direct mentoring + a one-page growth memo per engineer — ladder overhead exceeds value.
